# Sweep Capital Group

> Private, institutional-grade day trading mentorship and capital allocation for serious investors. Discipline is the only edge.

Sweep Capital Group is a private trading firm based in Atlanta offering a structured mentorship cohort, post-trade review, and capital allocation for vetted operators.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the firm, philosophy, and how to apply.
- [About](/about): Origin, principles, and how Sweep Capital Group operates.
- [Leadership](/leadership): Co-founders Mac Moore and Sam Teese.
- [Mentorship](/mentorship): Cohort structure, curriculum, and outcomes.
- [Book a Call](/book): Schedule an intro conversation.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
